stemHtml: What is correct about simultaneous independent approaches?

options.a: All approaches must be monitored by ATS regardless of weather conditions.
options.b: Crew members ensure separation; radar monitoring is mandatory when the ceiling is below 5000 ft.
options.c: Crew members ensure separation; radar monitoring is mandatory when the ceiling is below MDA.
options.d: Crew members ensure separation; radar monitoring is mandatory for instrument approaches.
